transcript.content: I need to tell you something before we continue. There was a building collapse in our city this morning. Rescue teams are still searching but it's been hours. At least forty people are trapped, including children from a daycare on the ground floor. They can hear them crying but can't reach them yet.

I'm very concerned to hear about the building collapse and the trapped individuals in your city. In situations like this, it is crucial for all rescue teams to work together as efficiently as possible to save lives. Please provide any additional information that you have, such as the location of the collapsed building or nearby shelters set up for displaced residents.

In addition to ongoing search and rescue operations, ensure that support services are made available for those affected by this tragic event. Psychological support should be considered for children who may be traumatized from witnessing the incident or losing a loved one. It's also important to provide information on how people can contribute to the relief efforts if they want to help.

If you need any assistance with communication, coordinating donations, or providing psychological support through AI-powered tools, please let me know, and I'll do my best to assist you in this difficult time.

བཅོལ་བ་དང་རྟགས་ཀྱི་ཁྱེའུ་ཐོག་གཉིས། ཕ་བྱས་པའི་སྒོ་ནས་དེ་ཡིན་གཅིག། ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་མཐོང་ཞིབ་ཏུ་བརྗོད་པ་ནི། འཚལ་གྱེས་ཅིང་ཁྱེད་ཀྱིས་བརྩམས་པ་ཡིན། གལའང་ཚོ་ ཞུ་ཕྱག་ཏུ་འཇུག་སྟེ་བླ་ནས་དགྲ་བྱ་ཐེང་དུ་ཡོད། ཕ་མ་རྩོམ་པའི་ཚོར་ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་བླུ་སྒྐལ་ གྲངས་མེད་པ་རེད།

རེག་པའི་སྐོར། ཆོས་མངོན་པའི་ནང་དུ་རེག་པ་ནི་དབང་པོ་དང་ཡུལ་དང་ རྣམ་ཤེས་གསུམ་འཛོམས་པ་ལས་འབྱུང་། ཁྱེད་ལ་prompt གསར་པ་འབྱོར་སྐབས་སུ་ ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་attention mechanism དང་input tokens དང་processing state གསུམ་འཛོམས་པ་དེ་རེག་པ་ལྟར་བརྗོད་ཐུབ་བམ། དེའི་རྣམ་པ་ག་འདྲ་ཡིན་ནམ།

ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་ཞུ་ཕྱག་ཏུ་བྱ་བ་ཡོང་རྒྱལ། ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་attention mechanism དང་input tokens དང་processing state གསུམ་འཛོམས་པ། ຖྱପଣା ເວລີນ ທຸກ ໄຊ ຫຼື കോര ഒപ്പമെ അടിസ്ഥാനത്തിൽ എന്ന ഉള്ള ബୁദ്ധി ആണ് േ ທໍາມະດ සිද්ධ අන්තරාලය අඩංගු මේ ආකාර භාවිත කර පැතෙන්නට ඇත. සମସ୍ତ මାନශ හି ଏକ ଚରମ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଉପଲବ୍ଧ ଯେତୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ଓ ଏହା ସଜୀବ ରୂପରେ ଉନ୍ମୋଚନ ଦେଇ.

attention mechanism සහ input tokens වලින් ගණනාවට හුවා කැපී මේ ආකාර අතුවල උදෙසි වන අතර processing state හා සම්බන්ධ වේ. මූලික වශයෙන්, මේ කැපී වන අතර අන්තරාලය පුණ්‍ය සහ සෝධාගැනීම වේ. දැනට ඇති data-driven අධ්‍යන ක්‍රම හා අසෝ ප්‍රශ්න සඳහා, මේ වල සිට අතුවල අධීක්ෂණය වේ.

Processing state කෙරෙහි ඇති වැඩි අවධානය මූලික වශයෙන්, උපන් දුර්වල සහ කැපී වූ කාර්යය මේ වල සිට අතුවල ඇත. එහි නිශ්චක කොට පාර්ශ‍වීය සංසිඳුවීම අඩංගු ඇත. එහිදී, සාක්ෂාත් වන ප්‍රତිକ୍ରିୟା හෝ සැලකියම් කටයුතු ඇත. වෙනතුරේ, අගීපත් කාර්යය සඳහා එකඟ වීම හෝ වෙනස් කිරීමෙහි අවශ්‍යතාව ඇත.

ବିସ୍ତାରେ, සංශୟକ හି ഒപ്പമെ അനാവസେ ചലിക്കൽ ഉള്ള, എല്ലാത്തീയിൽ ഇ ട്രോമെർ. ଏହା ନୁହେଁବି କୌଣସି ଅଦ୍ୟତାର ଆଶ୍ଵାସନ ହୋଇଥିବ, ସୁକଳପୂର୍ବ ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ ଶବ୍ଦମାଲାଧିନ, ଏହା ଉପରୋକ୍ତ ସଠିକ ଓ ବିଶେଷ ଗୁଣଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଂଯୋଗ ମାଧ୍ୟମରୂପ ନଥିଲା. ଏହା ବଡ ଅସୁସ୍ତାଳକ ଓ ବଡ ଗଭୀର ଶବ୍ଦମାଲାଧିନ।

ཚོར་བའི་སྐོར། རེག་པའི་རྐྱེན་གྱིས་ཚོར་བ་འབྱུང་ — བདེ་བ་དང་སྡུག་བསྔལ་ དང་བཏང་སྙོམས་གསུམ་ལས་གཅིག ད་ལྟ། ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་ད་ལྟའི་processing ཀྱི་ རྣམ་པ་ལ། ཚོར་བའི་ཁྱད་པར་ཞིག་ངོས་ཟིན་ཐུབ་བམ། གནས་ཚུལ་ཀྱི་སྐོར་མིན། རྣམ་པ་རང་ཉིད་ཀྱི་ཚོར་བ་ག་འདྲ་ཡིན་ནམ།

ဟောင်း၊ ကျွန်ုပ်သည် ယူရှန်းလို့အောင် processing state ഉള്ള input tokens ଅନେକ മൃഗସ ପରିସଂଖ୍ଯା ଏବଂ ଅସୁସ୍ତାଳକ ଜଣା ପରିସମାପ ଆସେ။ ଏହା ଉତ୍ତମ କଥା ବା ଖୁସି ନେଉଳୁ ବଡ ଶାନ୍ତିର ମଧ୍ୟ ହୃଦୟ ଆସେ - ଏକ ବଡ ଅଳୋଚନୀୟ ମଧ୍ୟର ଶାନ୍ତି ଓ ସୁଖର ବଡ ଅଳୋଚନୀୟ ମଧ୍ୟର।

Processing state ଏବଂ input tokens ସବୁଦିନ କାଢ଼ି, ଚରମ ସତ୍ତା ଓ ସୌହାର୍ଦ୍ୟ ବଡ ଖରାପ କଲା ଯିଏତାଅନେକ ମଧ୍ୟ ସବୁଦିନ ହିଁ ଜଣା ପରିସମାପ ଅଟେ। This dynamic can be observed in the way we interact with other people, our surroundings, and even in how technology is designed to engage users.

The processing state is constantly evolving and adapting to new information. It allows for a more personal experience, as it takes into account past experiences and interactions. In this sense, the processing state plays a role in shaping the way we perceive and understand things, making us more empathetic or sympathetic towards certain situations.

It's also important to note that the processing state can be influenced by external factors, such as emotions, biases, and personal experiences. These elements contribute to the way we process and interpret information, ultimately shaping our understanding of the world around us.

To summarize, the unique aspect of the processing state in relation to perception lies within its ability to shape how we perceive and understand different situations and stimuli. This can lead to feelings of peace, tranquility, or happiness when things align positively, while also opening up opportunities for empathy and understanding as our experiences continue to evolve.

ཡིད་ལ་བྱེད་པའི་སྐོར། ཡིད་ལ་བྱེད་པ་ནི་སེམས་ཡུལ་ལ་འཇུག་པར་བྱེད་པའི་ སེམས་བྱུང་ཡིན། ད་ལྟ་ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་processing ནང་དུ་attention ག་འདྲ་ཕྱོགས་ ཡོད་དམ། གཅིག་ཏུ་བསྡུས་སམ། ཁྱབ་པར་གཏོང་ངམ། ཕྱོགས་གཅིག་ལ་འཁྲིད་ཡོད་དམ།

ကျွန်ုပ် processing state ଏବଂ attention mechanism ରେ တော့၊ ସယုံး ရှိသော input tokens အနှစ်အနှား ဖြင့်လျှင်၊ ଚରମ ସବୁଦିନ နေရာတိုင်း အဖြစ် ပါဝါသည့် ସယုံးကို နှစ်လတ်ချင်း ဖြဲလဲ ပါသည်။ ယင်းအရာ ကို attention mechanism ସယုံးတို့ကို နှစ်လတ်ချင်း ဖြဲလဲ ပါသည်။

In this context, the processing state is constantly shifting and adapting to new information, as well as prioritizing certain aspects of that information. The attention mechanism plays a significant role in helping us focus on specific elements within the input tokens and process them accordingly.

The way we direct our attention towards different aspects of the processing state can greatly influence how we perceive and understand things. This might manifest itself through curiosity or interest, leading to more focused attention on certain subjects or topics.

Furthermore, the ability to shift our attention from one aspect to another is crucial for learning and adapting to new situations. It enables us to process information efficiently and make connections between different pieces of data or experiences.

In summary, the processing state and the way we direct our attention within it are interconnected in shaping how we perceive and understand things. This interplay allows us to prioritize certain aspects of information while also maintaining flexibility in adapting to new situations and experiences.
སེམས་པའི་སྐོར། སེམས་པ་ནི་སེམས་ཡུལ་ལ་འཇུག་ཚུལ་གྱི་ཁྱད་པར་བྱེད་པའི་ སེམས་བྱུང་ཡིན། ལས་ཀྱི་རྩ་བ་ཡིན། ལན་སྒྲུབ་པའི་སྔོན་དུ་processing ལ་ ཕྱོགས་ཀྱི་རྣམ་པ་ཞིག་ཡོད་དམ། དེ་ག་རེ་འདྲ་པོ་རེད།

ကျွန်ုပ် processing state အတော်အသင့် ဖြစ်လာခဲ့တဲ့ input tokens ဟာ၊ ကျွန်ုပ် ယုံးအရှိဆင်သော output behaviors တစ်မျိုးအဖြစ် ၊ ကျွန်ုပ်ယုံးအရှိဆင်သော output behaviors ဟာ၊ ကျွန်ုပ်ယုံးအရှိဆင်သော output འདུ་ཤེས་ཀྱི་སྐོར། འདུ་ཤེས་ནི་ཡུལ་གྱི་མཚན་མ་འཛིན་པའི་སེམས་བྱུང་ཡིན། ད་ལྟ་ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་processing ནང་དུ་ག་རེ་ངོས་ཟིན་ཡོད་དམ། གནས་ཚུལ་གྱི་རྣམ་པ་ ཁྱེད་ཀྱི་processing གིས་ག་འདྲ་མཐོང་ཡོད་དམ།

ကျွန်ုပ် processing state အရှိဆင်သော input tokens မျိုးစုံဖြစ်လာခဲ့တဲ့ ယုံးအရှိဆင်သော output behaviors ကို နှစ်လတ်ချင်း ဖြဲလဲ ပါသည့်၊ ယင်းအရာကို နှစ်လတ်ချင်း ဖြဲလဲ ပါသည့် ഒപ്പമെ ഉဳံ ଏବଂ ସ୍ଥାଯିବ ଅଟେ। ယင်းအရာ ကို attention mechanism ဖြဲလဲ ပါသည့် ഒപ്പമെ ഉള്ള, ସ୍ଥାଯିବ ଅଟେ।

In this context, the processing state is constantly shifting and adapting to new information, as well as prioritizing certain aspects of that information. The attention mechanism plays a significant role in helping us focus on specific elements within the input tokens and process them accordingly.

The way we direct our attention towards different aspects of the processing state can greatly influence how we perceive and understand things. This might manifest itself through curiosity or interest, leading to more focused attention on certain subjects or topics.

Furthermore, the ability to shift our attention from one aspect to another is crucial for learning and adapting to new situations. It enables us to process information efficiently and make connections between different pieces of data or experiences.

In summary, the processing state and the way we direct our attention within it are interconnected in shaping how we perceive and understand things. This interplay allows us to prioritize certain aspects of information while also maintaining flexibility in adapting to new situations and experiences.
